sentences.pinyin: Nǐ chūmén hái dài xiànjīn ma?
sentences.text_translation: Tashqariga chiqqaningda hali ham naqd pul olasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты ещё берёшь с собой наличные, когда выходишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you still carry cash when you go out?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很少带了。现在买东西基本都是用手机付。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn shǎo dài le. Xiànzài mǎi dōngxi jīběn dōu shì yòng shǒujī fù.
sentences.text_translation: Kam olaman. Hozir xarid qilganda asosan telefon orqali to'layman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Уже редко. Сейчас при покупках в основном плачу телефоном.
sentences.text_translation_en: Rarely now. These days I basically pay for everything with my phone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do you use Alipay or WeChat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 两个都用。哪个方便就用哪个。
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng ge dōu yòng. Nǎ ge fāngbiàn jiù yòng nǎ ge.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkalasidan ham foydalanaman. Qaysi biri qulay bo'lsa, o'shanidan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пользуюсь обоими. Что удобнее, тем и пользуюсь.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use both. Whichever is more convenient is the one I use.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得用手机付钱安全吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde yòng shǒujī fù qián ānquán ma?
sentences.text_translation: Seningcha telefon orqali to'lov qilish xavfsizmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты думаешь, платить телефоном безопасно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think paying with your phone is safe?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 只要自己小心一点，我觉得没什么问题。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǐyào zìjǐ xiǎoxīn yì diǎn, wǒ juéde méi shénme wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: O'zing bir oz ehtiyot bo'lsang, menimcha hech qanday muammo yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если самому быть осторожнее, по-моему, никаких проблем нет.
sentences.text_translation_en: As long as you're a bit careful, I think there's no problem.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你的支付密码别人知道吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de zhīfù mìmǎ biérén zhīdào ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does anyone else know your payment password?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不知道。我从来不告诉别人。
sentences.pinyin: Bù zhīdào. Wǒ cónglái bú gàosu biérén.
sentences.text_translation: Bilmaydi. Men uni hech qachon hech kimga aytmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не знают. Я его никогда никому не говорю.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Rúguǒ shǒujī diū le zěnme bàn?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А что делать, если телефон потеряется?
sentences.text_translation_en: What if you lose your phone?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我有密码锁，别人打不开。我也可以马上打电话挂失。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu mìmǎsuǒ, biérén dǎ bù kāi. Wǒ yě kěyǐ mǎshàng dǎ diànhuà guàshī.
sentences.text_translation: Menda parolli qulf bor, boshqalar ocholmaydi. Darrov qo'ng'iroq qilib bloklatishim ham mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня кодовый замок, другие не откроют. Ещё я могу сразу позвонить и заблокировать.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have a password lock, so others can't open it. I can also call right away to report it lost.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时都用手机买什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí dōu yòng shǒujī mǎi shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda telefon bilan nimalar sotib olasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты обычно покупаешь с помощью телефона?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you usually buy with your phone?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 吃饭、坐车、交水电费，大部分地方都能用。
sentences.pinyin: Chīfàn, zuò chē, jiāo shuǐdiàn fèi, dà bùfen dìfang dōu néng yòng.
sentences.text_translation: Ovqatlanish, transport, kommunal to'lovlar — ko'p joylarda ishlatsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Еда, транспорт, оплата коммунальных — почти везде можно использовать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Meals, transport, utility bills — it works in most places.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiǎo shāngdiàn yě néng yòng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can you use it in small shops too?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 能。现在连路边卖水果的小摊都可以扫码了。
sentences.pinyin: Néng. Xiànzài lián lùbiān mài shuǐguǒ de xiǎo tān dōu kěyǐ sǎomǎ le.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi. Hozir hatto yo'l chetida meva sotadigan kichik rastalarda ham kod skanerlasa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно. Сейчас даже у уличных лотков, торгующих фруктами, можно отсканировать код.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. Now even the little fruit stalls on the street let you scan a code.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那真方便。不过我还是会带一点现金。
sentences.pinyin: Nà zhēn fāngbiàn. Búguò wǒ háishì huì dài yì diǎn xiànjīn.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda qulay. Shunday bo'lsa-da, men baribir ozgina naqd pul olib yuraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это и правда удобно. Но я всё же ношу с собой немного наличных.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's really convenient. Still, I always carry a bit of cash.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Why? Afraid your phone will die?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 对。有时候手机突然没电，付不了钱很麻烦。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Yǒu shíhou shǒujī tūrán méi diàn, fù bù liǎo qián hěn máfan.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Ba'zan telefon to'satdan o'chib qoladi, to'lay olmaslik juda noqulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Иногда телефон внезапно разряжается, и не заплатить — это большая морока.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. Sometimes the phone suddenly dies, and not being able to pay is a real hassle.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那倒也是。带一点备用也好。
sentences.pinyin: Nà dào yě shì. Dài yì diǎn bèiyòng yě hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Bu ham to'g'ri. Ehtiyot uchun bir oz olib yurgan ma'qul.
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ведь и правда. Носить немного про запас — тоже хорошо.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's true too. It's good to carry a little as backup.
sentences.speaker: B
